meta.title: Collaboration — Why Join Our Survey Panel | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: Field your research on InsightPanel: 1.9M+ verified respondents, fast fielding under 48 hours, and fair pay that produces cleaner data.
meta.ogAlt: Why brands and researchers partner with InsightPanel

hero.subtitle: InsightPanel connects your research to 1.9M+ engaged, verified respondents — with faster fielding, cleaner data, and fair pay built into every study.

panelSize.label: Panel size
panelSize.text: Verified, profiled respondents across 120+ demographics and interest categories.

fairPay.title: Fair pay, better data
fairPay.text: Respondents who are paid fairly answer more carefully. That's the whole thesis.

steps.title: Tell us your target
steps.text: Demographics, interests, or custom screening criteria — we scope it with you.

steps.title: We field it
steps.text: Your study goes live to matched panelists with quality controls running throughout.

steps.title: You get clean data
steps.text: Export results or connect via API — validated, deduplicated, ready to analyze.

cta.title: Let's field your next study
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your research needs — our team replies within one business day.
